description: Mutating parity slice: a single non-skill-gated bare `north` from the starting room (village_square -> blacksmith_forge, terrain=normal, no lock/condition-flags). Raw is the BARE direction word (not `go north`) because Rust's route.rs only dispatches a single-token line to its execution path this phase (a two-token `go north` always falls back to Python, regardless of the allow-list) -- see rust/crates/lorecraft-server/src/route.rs. The Rust-port movement (Phase 4c) golden -- the mutating-verb counterpart to look_only.
